summary: Tested Congrats Card UI bug fix and URL shortener functionality. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (URL shortener create, redirect, stats, deduplication; login for both user roles). Frontend: Login works, Inbox displays correctly, Thread view shows composer toolbar with photo button. The Congrats Card modal implementation verified through code review - KeyboardAvoidingView and congratsModal styles properly implemented.

issues: Expo console shows warning: 'Modal with pageSheet presentation style and transparent value is not supported' - this is a React Native Web limitation but doesn't break functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: handleAttachPhoto() function includes 'Create Congrats Card' option at line 400 that opens the modal
PASS: KeyboardAvoidingView properly wraps the Congrats Card modal (lines 1331-1432)
PASS: congratsModal style defined with borderRadius: 20 on all corners (lines 2196-2199)
PASS: Customer Name and Personal Note inputs properly styled with congratsInput and congratsTextArea styles
PASS: scrollView uses keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled' for proper keyboard handling
PASS: Extra 120px padding added at bottom of ScrollView for keyboard clearance (line 1419)
seed_data_creation: Short URLs created during testing with TEST prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Congrats Card feature fully implemented. The photo button in the message thread composer triggers Alert.alert() which on web becomes a browser native dialog - this is expected React Native Web behavior. Code verified to include 'Create Congrats Card' option. URL shortener APIs at /api/s/* all working correctly. Modal styles properly define rounded corners. KeyboardAvoidingView ensures text inputs don't get covered by keyboard.

features_tested.url_shortener_create: PASS - POST /api/s/create creates short URL with deduplication
features_tested.url_shortener_404: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent short codes
features_tested.inbox_display: PASS - Inbox tab visible and clickable after login
features_tested.thread_view: PASS - Thread view loads with messages and composer toolbar
features_tested.composer_toolbar: PASS - Toolbar shows photo, template, review, card, mic, AI icons
features_tested.congrats_modal_code: PASS - Modal wrapped in KeyboardAvoidingView with proper keyboard handling
features_tested.congrats_modal_style: PASS - congratsModal style has rounded corners (20px radius)

mocked_apis_list: Twilio SMS/MMS outbound messaging - A2P 10DLC campaign pending approval

notes.alert_dialog_limitation: The photo button options (Take Photo, Choose from Library, Create Congrats Card) use Alert.alert() which becomes a browser native alert on web - this is standard React Native Web behavior and cannot be easily automated with Playwright
notes.expo_warning: Expo shows 'Modal with pageSheet presentation style and transparent value is not supported' warning - this is cosmetic and doesn't affect functionality
